THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF CCSF'S AND PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION PAPERS AND ESM, INC.'S REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Spencer J. Pahlke, Esq. of Walkup Melodia Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ESM INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied. There is a triable issue of whether ESM exercised control over the sidewalk where the accident occurred. (Deposition of Emily Mitra 13:19-16:25). (Prevailing party submitted a proposed order to the court.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ESM INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to October 23 to give ESM, Inc. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. ESM, Inc. must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm October 16, or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of CCSF's and plaintiff's opposition papers and ESM, Inc.'s reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
